name: Internal Knowledge Without External Expression: Probing the Generalization Boundary of a Classical Chinese Language Model
summary: arXiv:2604.14180v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We train a 318M-parameter Transformer language model from scratch on a curated corpus of 1.56 billion tokens of pure Classical Chinese, wit...
description: arXiv:2604.14180v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We train a 318M-parameter Transformer language model from scratch on a curated corpus of 1.56 billion tokens of pure Classical Chinese, with zero English characters or Arabic numerals. Through systematic out-of-distribution (OOD) testing, we ask whether the model distinguishes known from unknown inputs, and whether it expresses that dist...
author: Jiuting Chen, Yuan Lian, Hao Wu, Tianqi Huang, Hiroshi Sasaki, Makoto Kouno, Jongil Choi
